title: Error accessing binary data in Telegram node
symptom: Using the expression '{{ $(“Telegram”).item.binary.data }}' results in an error, displaying '[object Object]'.
applies_when: Attempting to access binary data with an expression
not_this_if: Binary data is accessed correctly using other methods
root_cause: The expression used to access the binary data is incorrect, leading to an output of '[object Object]' instead of the expected binary data.
fix_steps: Check the structure of the data being returned by the Telegram node.
Use the correct path to access the binary data, ensuring it matches the expected format.
agent_instruction: Verify the data structure and use the correct expression to access the binary data from the Telegram node.
